name: I'm in the Armory
hints: The armory has weapons and armor. Some items may be useful, others are red herrings.
The shield might protect you. The sword is dull and broken - probably not useful as-is.
GET SHIELD for protection. The suit of armor may hide something. WEST returns to the torture chamber.
notes: Armory with shield, broken sword, and suit of armor. The shield may be useful for protection. Some items are red herrings. WEST returns to the torture chamber (room 13).
